originalTitle: 'The weapons were loud, but there was always music': Sudanese band play on through the war
title: 'The weapons were loud, but there was always music': Sudanese band play on through the war
content: One of Sudan's most popular bands, Aswat Almadina, recall being in the studio when the war broke out three years ago.

originalTitle: Millions listen to Ethiopian star's song taking swipe at government
title: Super Star Teddy Afro Sings About Being Friends!
content:
Hello from Africa!

Hi, amazing friends! Guess what? Your friendly kid reporter from Africa is here to share some super exciting news! Today, we have a wonderful story from a beautiful country called Ethiopia. It’s a very special place with lots of kind people and amazing history.

Meet Teddy Afro, a Super Star!

Have you ever heard a song that makes you want to dance and sing along? Well, in Ethiopia, there is a super-duper famous singer named Teddy Afro! He is like a superhero with a microphone. Many, many people love his songs. He sings about important things and makes everyone feel happy and proud. His music makes millions of people smile. He is very good at making music that touches people's hearts and makes them think. He has a lot of fans, just like you might have a favorite cartoon character or a favorite football player.

A Brand New Song!

Teddy Afro has a brand new song out! And guess what it's all about? It’s about being friends and working together. It’s like when you play a game with your classmates. Everyone helps each other to win, right? That’s what Teddy Afro sings about for his whole country! He wants everyone in Ethiopia to hold hands and be one big team. This makes the country strong and happy. His song is full of good feelings and a message of kindness.

What is 'Unity'?

Teddy Afro sings about something called "unity." It’s a big word, but it means something simple and wonderful! Imagine you and your friends are building a tall tower with blocks. If everyone puts their blocks together, the tower gets very, very tall and strong. But if everyone builds their own small tower, none of them will be very big or strong. "Unity" means everyone working together like a super team! It means being together and helping each other. It means no one feels left out and everyone is part of the same big family.

Why Is Being Together Important?

When people are united, amazing things can happen! They can help each other when times are hard. They can make their towns cleaner and more beautiful. They can make sure everyone has enough food and a safe place to live. They can build new schools where children can learn, and new hospitals where people can get well. It's like when all the ants work together to carry a big leaf – they can do things that one ant alone cannot! When we are united, we are strong and happy. We can solve problems easily when we work as one big family, helping each other out.

Did You Know?

Did you know that Ethiopia is one of the oldest countries in the world? It has many, many old stories and beautiful places like mountains and lakes. It's also super famous for its yummy coffee! Maybe your parents drink coffee? It might come from Ethiopia! Ethiopia is a big country in Africa, with lots of different kinds of people and beautiful languages. It is a land of brave heroes and a very strong, proud history.

Teddy Afro's Big Dream

Teddy Afro has a big dream for Ethiopia. He dreams that everyone will be happy and live in peace. He dreams that people will help each other grow and make their lives better. He sings from his heart about this dream. He wants his country to be the best it can be for everyone living there. His song is like a special message in a bottle, sent out to everyone. It tells them to be kind and friendly and to always look out for each other. He wants everyone to be proud of Ethiopia and work together for its wonderful future.

Music Makes Us One!

Music is like magic, isn’t it? When you hear a good song, you feel good! You might tap your feet, clap your hands, or even dance around. Teddy Afro’s music does this for millions of people. When people listen to his song, they all hear the same happy and important message. They can all sing along, no matter where they are. This makes them feel like they are part of something big and special. Music can bring people together, even if they are far apart or don't know each other. It makes everyone feel like a friend. It's like a universal language that everyone can understand and enjoy!

What Kids Can Do

Even kids like you can show unity every day! How? It’s simple! * You can share your toys with your friends when you play. * You can help your classmates if they need help with their schoolwork. * You can be kind to everyone, even if they are different from you. * You can include everyone in your games during playtime. * You can listen to your teachers and your parents and help around the house. When you do these things, you are showing unity! You are helping to make your home, your school, and your country a better place. You are helping to make Teddy Afro's dream come true. Every little bit of kindness and working together helps a lot.

A Song for a Brighter Tomorrow

Teddy Afro's new song is not just a song to dance to. It’s a very important message for everyone. It’s a message of hope and happiness. It’s a message that says, "Let's all be friends and work together!" Millions of people are listening to this song all over Ethiopia. They are hearing his message and thinking about how they can help. It's a wonderful way to remind everyone that we are all in this together. And when we are together, we are unstoppable and can make wonderful things happen! Let’s all sing along and make our countries shine bright and full of friendship!
summary: Teddy Afro, a super famous singer from Ethiopia, has released a new song that encourages everyone to be united and work together like one big happy family to make their country strong and full of peace.
whyMatters: This is important because when people listen to special music about being together, it helps them remember to be kind, share, and work as a team, making their homes, schools, and countries happier places for everyone to live and grow.

originalTitle: DR Congo accepts first set of deportees from the US
title: DR Congo accepts first set of deportees from the US
content: The Congolese government stresses those expelled from the US are only in the country temporarily.

originalTitle: Protesters defy Berlin rain to call for end to global wars
title: Protesters defy Berlin rain to call for end to global wars
content: Hundreds protested in Berlin against the US-Israeli aggression on Iran, and Israeli attacks on Gaza and Lebanon.

originalTitle: Who will shape the global agenda – the left or far right?
title: Who will shape the global agenda – the left or far right?
content: Left-wing leaders meet in Barcelona while far-right figures march in Milan.

originalTitle: With loss at Man City, have Arsenal lost their grip on the Premier League?
title: With loss at Man City, have Arsenal lost their grip on the Premier League?
content: Arsenal's loss to City and a woeful end-of-season run have now cost them their once-comfortable, top-of-the-table lead.

originalTitle: Eight children killed in Louisiana shooting, police say
title: Eight children killed in Louisiana shooting, police say
content: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting in Shreveport, Louisiana, which police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".

originalTitle: Tehran will never cede control of Strait of Hormuz, senior Iranian politician tells BBC
title: Tehran will never cede control of Strait of Hormuz, senior Iranian politician tells BBC
content: Lyse Doucet speaks to Ebrahim Azizi, who says Iran "will decide the right of passage" through the crucial shipping route.

originalTitle: Ukraine police chief resigns after officers allegedly fled deadly shooting
title: Ukraine police chief resigns after officers allegedly fled deadly shooting
content: Authorities say the officers have been suspended and an investigation into their actions is under way.

title: Watch: Match of the Day
content: Arsenal travel to Manchester City, and there's a Merseyside derby.

originalTitle: Are Man City now title favourites after win over Arsenal?
title: Are Man City now title favourites after win over Arsenal?
content: Erling Haaland's winning goal, the explosion of noise, the reaction at full-time - are Man City now favourites to win the Premier League title?

originalTitle: Man City beat Arsenal to close gap in title race
title: Man City beat Arsenal to close gap in title race
content: Erling Haaland and Rayan Cherki strike as Manchester City beat league leaders Arsenal to close the gap to three points with a game in hand and pile more pressure on Mikel Arteta's side.
